lines.gurmukhi: ਨਖਿਅਤ੍ਰ ਸਸੀਅਰ ਸੂਰ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਬਸੁਧ ਗਗਨਾ ਗਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: nakhiatr saseear soor dhiaaveh basudh gaganaa gaave |
lines.english: The stars, the moon and the sun meditate on Him; the earth and the sky sing to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਅਰਾਧਹਿ ਪਉਣ ਪਾਣੀ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: gupat pragatt jaa kau araadheh paun paanee dinas raat |
lines.english: The invisible and visible beings worship Him in adoration, along with wind and water, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਖਾਣੀ ਸਗਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: sagal khaanee sagal baanee sadaa sadaa dhiaave |
lines.english: All the sources of creation, and all languages meditate on Him, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਚਤੁਰ ਬੇਦਹ ਖਟੁ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਜਪਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: simrit puraan chatur bedah khatt saasatr jaa kau japaat |
lines.english: The Simritees, the Puraanas, the four Vedas and the six Shaastras meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: patit paavan bhagat vachhal naanak mileeai sang saat |3|
lines.english: He is the Purifier of sinners, the Lover of His Saints; O Nanak, He is met in the Society of the Saints. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਜਾਨਤ ਜੋ ਸੇਵੈ ਤੇਤੀ ਨਹ ਜਾਇ ਗਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: anajaanat jo sevai tetee neh jaae ganee |
lines.english: Those unknown ones who serve You cannot be counted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਜਨਾਈ ਰਸਨਾ ਤੇਤ ਭਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jetee prabhoo janaaee rasanaa tet bhanee |
lines.english: As much as God has revealed to us, that much we can speak with our tongues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਿਗਤ ਅਗਨਤ ਅਥਾਹ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਗਲ ਮੰਝੇ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: avigat aganat athaah tthaakur sagal manjhe baaharaa |
lines.english: Imperishable, incalculable, and unfathomable is the Lord and Master; He is everywhere, inside and out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਿ ਭਗਤ ਥੀਆ ਮਿਲੇ ਜੀਆ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਕਿਤ ਗਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: vas bhagat theea mile jeea taa kee upamaa kit ganee |
lines.english: He is in the power of His devotees; those whose souls are united with Him - how can their praises be sung?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜਾਚਿਕ ਏਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਨਹ ਦੂਰਿ ਸੰਗੀ ਜਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sarab jaachik ek daataa neh door sangee jaaharaa |
lines.english: We are all beggars, He is the One and only Giver; He is not far away, but is with us, ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਮਾਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਾਏ ਸੀਸੁ ਸਾਧਹ ਧਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ॥੪॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: eihu daan maan naanak paae sees saadhah dhar charanee |4|2|5|
lines.english: May Nanak receive this gift and honor, of placing his head on the feet of the Holy Saints. ||4||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl,

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਹੋ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: audam karahu vaddabhaageeho simarahu har har raae |
lines.english: Make the effort, O very fortunate ones, and meditate on the Lord, the Lord King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਭ ਸੁਖ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jis simarat sabh sukh hoveh dookh darad bhram jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, remembering Him in meditation, you shall obtain total peace, and your pains and troubles and doubts shall depart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਹ ਅਲਸਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: naam japat gobind neh alasaaeeai |
lines.english: Chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord of the Universe; don't be lazy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਟਤ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਨਹ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhettat saadhoo sang jam pur neh jaaeeai |
lines.english: Meeting with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you shall not have to go to the City of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨਿ ਮੁਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas araadh har har dhiaae so prabh man mukhee |
lines.english: With each and every breath, worship the Lord in adoration; meditate on the Lord God in your mind and with your mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਦਰਦ ਨ ਭਉ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਦ ਸੁਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad na bhau biaapai naam simarat sad sukhee |
lines.english: Pain, trouble and fear will not afflict you; meditating on the Naam, a lasting peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਰਸਾਲ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kripaal deaal rasaal gun nidh kar deaa sevaa laaeeai |
lines.english: O kind and compassionate Lord, O treasure of sublime essence, treasure of excellence, please link me to Your service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਨ ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: paavan patit puneet naam niranjanaa |
lines.english: The Purifier of sinners is the Naam, the Pure Name of the Immaculate Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਚਰਣ ਜੰਪੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਹ ਅਲਸਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai charan janpai naam japat gobind neh alasaaeeai |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak: may I meditate on the Lord's lotus feet, and not be lazy in chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord of the Universe. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur giaan anjan prabh niranjan jal thal maheeal pooriaa |
lines.english: By the healing ointment of the Guru's spiritual wisdom, one meets the Immaculate Lord God, who is totally pervading the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮ ਅੰਧੇਰ ਬਿਨਾਸ ਗਿਆਨ ਗੁਰ ਅੰਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bharam andher binaas giaan gur anjanaa |
lines.english: The darkness of doubt is removed by the healing ointment of the Guru's spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧ ਸਮਰਥ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਰਬ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: agaadh bodh samarath suaamee sarab kaa bhau bhanjanaa |
lines.english: The wisdom of the all-powerful Lord and Master is incomprehensible; He is the Destroyer of the fears of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਿਟੇ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਵਿਸੂਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik nimakh jaa kai ridai vasiaa mitte tiseh visooriaa |
lines.english: If He dwells within the heart, for even an instant, sorrows are forgotten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਚਰਣ ਜੰਪੈ ਪਾਵਨ ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai charan janpai paavan patit puneet naam niranjanaa |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I meditate on the Lord's lotus feet. The Purifier of sinners is the Naam, the Pure Name of the Immaculate Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਕਾਰਨ ਕਰਨ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਰਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har charan kaaran karan suaamee patit udharan har hare |
lines.english: The Lord's lotus feet are the cause of causes; the Lord Master saves even the sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਆਸਰ ਤੁਅ ਚਰਨ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਿਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: mohi aasar tua charan tumaaree saran sidhe |
lines.english: I take the support of Your lotus feet, and in the protection of Your Sanctuary, I attain perfection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: ott gahee gopaal deaal kripaa nidhe |
lines.english: I have grasped the protection of the merciful Lord, the Sustainer of the Universe, the treasure of grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਭਵ ਉਤਾਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਬਹੁ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: saagar sansaar bhav utaar naam simarat bahu tare |
lines.english: So many are saved; they cross over the terrifying world-ocean, contemplating the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਖੋਜਹਿ ਸੁਨੀ ਉਧਰਨ ਸੰਤਸੰਗ ਬਿਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: aad ant beant khojeh sunee udharan santasang bidhe |
lines.english: In the beginning and in the end, countless are those who seek the Lord. I have heard that the Society of the Saints is the way to salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਚਰਨ ਜੰਪੈ ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai charan janpai ott gahee gopaal deaal kripaa nidhe |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I meditate on the Lord's lotus feet, and grasp the protection of the Lord of the Universe, the merciful, the ocean of kindness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਆਪਿ ਬਨਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal har birad aap banaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord is the Lover of His devotees; this is His natural way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਸੰਤ ਅਰਾਧਹਿ ਤਹ ਤਹ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh sant araadheh teh teh pragattaaeaa |
lines.english: Wherever the Saints worship the Lord in adoration, there He is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨੰਦ ਹਰਿ ਜਸ ਮਹਾ ਮੰਗਲ ਸਰਬ ਦੂਖ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aanand har jas mahaa mangal sarab dookh visaariaa |
lines.english: In the ecstasy of the Lord's Praises, they obtain supreme joy, and forget all their sorrows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਲੀਏ ਸਮਾਇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਭਗਤ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: prabh aap lee samaae sehaj subhaae bhagat kaaraj saariaa |
lines.english: God blends Himself with His devotees in His natural way, and resolves their affairs.
